title: RF elements omni Antenna for Stationbox 2.4GHz/2dBi
category: RF elements / Wireless / Antennas / Omnidirectional antennas / 2.4GHz
description: Compact Indoor Omni-Directional Antenna designed to be used with MikroTik RouterBoard RB912/RB711 when installed inside of StationBox®InSpot . Direct connection to MMCX port of integrated radio eliminates pigtails, saves cost and decreases RF losses. Installation is super quick and easy
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 1 x 1 VSWR < 1,5 Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 13 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 360 Antenna type Omnidirectional Antenna gain [dBi] 2 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (1) MMCX
